Maximus overflows with magical power. Most of it comes from the
I-I saw inside the mana storage facility. It was huge and dark,
and there were lower halves of bodies all in rows.
Will I end up in there one day? I'm so scared... This is the worst
country to have been enslaved to.
What? You're looking for the king? You're going to... defeat him?
I don't know where he is, but if you're really intent on fighting
Those dismembered humans in the magic warehouse were still
alive, but they were all missing their upper bodies.
J-Just how many lives has Maximus taken...?
A weapon of unknown origin was discovered buried beneath the
stables. Due to mishandling, several of those who found it died.
Before the mana facility was built, artillery was the primary means
of defense. Those were hard times, especially with the Ultra Beasts.
Iron was used for most armaments back when magical equipment
was rare. Nowadays, magical equipment is far more prevalent.
The mana storage facility is the reason Maximus has become the
The king's a genius for inventing such a marvelous thing!
Even the Empire has to respect Maximus's power!
There are a large number of slaves stored in the mana facility!
It's constantly extracting and storing magical power!
We capture mages, enslave them, and stick them in there!
Cooperating with the Empire's made us rich!
The king even invented the Magic Units they use in Rooklook! Cut a
slave in half to store mana and defend the country all at once!
The king's ideas constantly impress me. He truly is a genius.
Argh! What's His Majesty thinking, sending the magic knights to the
dungeon instead of letting them protect him!?
That ladder retracts automatically. If you want to go to the upper
floors, you'll need to find another route.
